title: fix buildah.spec
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

After 1.7 submit merged, noted the changed did not get listed
under 1.7 in contrib/rpm/buildah.spec as they should be.

comments.body: @rhadat, PTAL.  Let me know if this messes anything up for the kit process......  I always find this kind of thing two seconds after it can't be reversed easily....

:pushpin: Commit c5cf3d9 has been approved by `rhatdan`
